data.eyebrow: Awarded Best App for Customer Experience
data.title: Mutual Fund Invest App — Profita
data.subtitle: An investment app that helps users build long-term wealth through personalized fund discovery, ROBO advisory, and seamless portfolio management.

data.label: Case Study
data.title: Profita — Seamless investment app
data.overview: Profita puts the investment world in your hands — an application from Land and Houses Bank that allows you to choose to invest in funds from mutual fund companies. Lead your own portfolio or let ROBO Advisor plan and manage investments to create returns according to your goals. Armed with useful investment information such as returns, historical prices, dividends, Morningstar ratings, and recommended funds from a team of professional advisors.

award.title: Best App for Customer Experience
award.event: Retail Banker International Asia Trailblazer Awards 2023

data.title: Design brief
data.body: Design a mutual fund app that offers unique funding experiences based on user profiles and preferences, regardless of their previous investment experience. Utilize AI technology to personalize the user experience.

questions.text: How can the app create a
questions.suffix: for users who are new to investing?

questions.highlight: intermediate and experienced investors optimize and diversify
ensure a seamless and intuitive experience
personalize the investment experience and keep users engaged

data.title: Getting to know the user & understanding the context

methods.label: User interviews
methods.body: I consider myself as a novice investor, which led me to begin doing empathy to get to know people as individuals, not just users. I asked open-ended questions about how they are doing in life, their work, and what interests them throughout the day. I interviewed four individuals representing our three key user groups — Novice Investors, Intermediate Investors, and Experienced Investors — to understand their expectations, fears, and goals.

data.text: How might we create a welcoming and educational onboarding experience for new users in the mutual fund app?

data.title: Uncovering user needs, pain points & opportunities.

items: Saving for a major life event
Fear of missing out on investment opportunities
Concerns about the complexity of financial markets
Desire for a visually appealing, user-friendly interface
Expectation of quick and seamless navigation
Preference for a simple and intuitive app design
Understanding the role of fees in fund management
Learning about risk management in investments
Clarification on different types of mutual funds
Awareness of tax implications on investments
Interest in socially responsible investment options
Willingness to explore international investment opportunities
Desire for real estate investment options
Comfort level with high-risk, high-return strategies
Interest in tailoring portfolios based on personal values
Desire for educational content based on user proficiency

items.name: Sarocha T.
items.biography: Recently started her career in marketing and is eager to begin investing. She has limited knowledge about investments and wants to start with something user-friendly and educational.
items.goal: Understand the basics of investing, create a simple portfolio, and save for a future home purchase.
items.needs: Educational resources, user-friendly interface, step-by-step guidance, and a supportive community.
items.frustrations: Overwhelmed by complex financial jargon, unsure where to start, and concerned about making the wrong investment decisions.
items.why_use: The app provides educational content, a simple onboarding process, and a supportive community — helping Sarocha gain confidence in her investment decisions.

items.name: Anan
items.biography: Works as a financial analyst with some experience in investing. Looking to diversify and optimize his portfolio using a platform with advanced features and tools.
items.goal: Diversify his investment portfolio, optimize returns, and stay updated on market trends.
items.needs: Advanced analytics, customizable features, access to diverse investment options, and real-time market updates.
items.frustrations: Limited customization options on existing platforms, lack of real-time data, and difficulty managing multiple investment accounts.
items.why_use: The app's advanced analytics, customization features, and wide range of investment options give Anan the tools he needs for strategic portfolio management.

items.name: Oraya W.
items.biography: Passionate about sustainable living and environmental conservation. She wants her investments to align with her values and contribute to socially responsible causes.
items.goal: Invest in socially responsible funds, support sustainable initiatives, and create a portfolio with positive impact.
items.needs: Socially responsible investment options, detailed information on ethical funds, and a platform that aligns with her environmental values.
items.frustrations: Limited availability of information on sustainable investments, lack of transparency in fund practices, and scarcity of platforms emphasizing socially responsible options.
items.why_use: The app's emphasis on socially responsible investing, detailed information on ethical funds, and alignment with environmental values makes it the right fit for Oraya.

data.title: Big ideas & feature prioritization
data.description: Together with our users, we identified features that directly address their needs and capitalize on opportunities from our research.

features.name: Educational Onboarding Wizard
features.rationale: Essential for guiding Sarocha through her initial investment journey

features.name: User-Friendly Dashboard
features.rationale: Clear overview, with educational content taking precedence

features.name: Customized Learning Paths
features.rationale: Tailors educational content to Sarocha's progress and interests

features.name: Investment Simulations
features.rationale: Valuable for practical learning — best introduced after initial onboarding

features.name: Advanced Analytics Toolkit
features.rationale: Crucial for making informed decisions and optimizing his portfolio

features.name: Diverse Investment Options
features.rationale: Critical for Anan's goal of diversifying beyond existing holdings

features.name: Portfolio Optimization Algorithm
features.rationale: Supports Anan's goal of optimizing returns and managing risk

features.name: Real-Time Market Alerts
features.rationale: Useful for staying informed, but secondary to analytics features

features.name: Ethical Fund Explorer
features.rationale: Critical for Oraya's goal of investing in socially responsible funds

features.name: Impact Measurement Tools
features.rationale: Helps Oraya assess the real-world impact of her investments

features.name: Socially Responsible Scorecards
features.rationale: Essential transparency tool aligned with Oraya's values

features.name: Sustainability Reports
features.rationale: Supports ongoing awareness but secondary to initial decision-making tools

features.name: Collaborative Cause Investing
features.rationale: Beneficial for community investment — not as critical as individual impact tools

data.headline: One app. Three completely different experiences.
data.description: The design challenge wasn't building features for each user — it was building one system that adapts. Switch between personas to feel the difference.

data.title: Navigating Opportunities
data.description: The fund discovery flow guides users from initial search through detailed evaluation to completed investment — adapting based on user preferences and risk profile.

creative_direction.notes: Blur-in mirrors the award moment — clarity emerging from years of work. Warm, unhurried.

data.headline: Best App for Customer Experience — Retail Banker International Asia, 2023.
data.body:
Three years after launch, Profita was recognized at the Retail Banker International Asia Trailblazer Awards — not for its technical capabilities, but for how it made customers feel.

The recognition validated a core design bet: that building for the least confident user (the Novice Investor) would raise the bar for everyone. Sarocha's onboarding experience was the same one Anan and Oraya went through. Making it genuinely welcoming — not just functional — was the thing that crossed segments and earned the recognition.

data.text: Personalization at scale doesn't mean different features for different users. It means one experience that makes every user feel like it was built for them.
